description: Executor-result dry-run should keep validation-conflict review primary while preserving rejected-result inspection and partial retry review in non-blocked mixed history.

expect_executor_dry_run.expected_recommendation: review executor validation conflict before another retry
expect_executor_dry_run.operator_summary: Executor history has validation conflicts and retry pressure; review both recommended actions before another retry.
recommended_action_summaries: Compare executor validation claims with deterministic verification artifacts before retrying.
Inspect rejected executor-result artifacts and fix freshness, provenance, or schema errors before retrying.
Review unresolved repair targets across repeated partial attempts before retrying.

name: executor_dry_run_validation_conflict_repeated_rejected_operator_actions
